name: get_recovery
description: Retrieve recovery data for physiological cycles. Each recovery record includes a 0-100 recovery score, resting heart rate, HRV (RMSSD in milliseconds), blood oxygen percentage (SpO2), and skin temperature. Recovery data is linked to cycles and becomes available after a scored sleep.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Start datetime in ISO 8601 format to filter results.

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: End datetime in ISO 8601 format to filter results.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of records to return per page.

parameters.name: nextToken
parameters.description: Pagination token for retrieving the next page of results.
